title: Inventory Link
description: Link everyone's inventory for a fun twist on multiplayer!
body:
# InventoryLink Mod

InventoryLink is a lightweight Minecraft mod that syncs players’ inventories in real-time, no matter the world, server, or chunk loading. Perfect for multi-instance setups or anyone who wants reliable inventory updates without hassle.

## Features
- **Real-Time Sync:** Your inventory updates instantly, even if you’re far away from other players or chunks.  
- **Stable & Bug-Free:** Works flawlessly even when players die or switch worlds.  
- **Lightweight:** Minimal impact on game performance.  
- **Easy Setup:** Just drop the `.jar` in your mods folder and play.

## Why It’s Better
Unlike similar mods, InventoryLink avoids common bugs like inventory desync on death and works without command blocks or loaded chunks—making it more reliable and user-friendly.

## Installation
1. Place the `InventoryLink.jar` into your mods folder.  
2. Launch Minecraft with Fabric.  
3. Configure optional settings in the mod menu.
